chapter_title.ar: باب الرَّجُلِ يُدْخِلُ يَدَهُ فِي الْإِنَاءِ قَبْلَ أَنْ يَغْسِلَهَا وَ الْحَدِّ فِي غَسْلِ الْيَدَيْنِ مِنَ الْجَنَابَةِ وَ الْبَوْلِ وَ الْغَائِطِ وَ النَّوْمِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 8 – The man enters his hand into the vessel before he washes it, and the limit with regards to washing of the two hands from the sexual impurity, and the urine, and the faeces, and the sleep

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (13/42)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (13/42)
text: سُئِلَ كَمْ يُفْرِغُ الرَّجُلُ عَلَى يَدِهِ قَبْلَ أَنْ يُدْخِلَهَا فِي الْإِنَاءِ قَالَ وَاحِدَةً مِنْ حَدَثِ الْبَوْلِ وَ ثِنْتَيْنِ مِنَ الْغَائِطِ وَ ثَلَاثَةً مِنَ الْجَنَابَةِ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Hammad, from Al Halby,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup>, said: ‘He<sup>asws</sup> was asked, ‘How many times should the man pour upon his hand before he enters it into the vessels?’ He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Once from passing the urine, and twice from the faeces, and thrice from the sexual impurity’.
en.sarwar: 5. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ibn abu ‘Umayr from Hammad from al-Halabiy who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, was asked about how many times one must wash his hands before immersing them in the water container. He (the Imam) said, ‘Once, because of urination, twice because of defecation and three times because of sexual relation.’”
